productDisplayName: Nike Men Lengo Black Sports Shoes
description: Built for speed on hard surfaces, the nike Lengo FG is a lightweight soccer cleat designed to give you revolutionary speed and ultimate in traction, cushioning and control. The entire shoe is designed such that it mirrors the shape of the foot and offers a premium Fit, allowing you to strike the ball fast and clear. Upper Ultra-lightweight synthetic leather adjusts to the foot shape and locks it down in place Lace-ups for a snug, customised fit Swoosh overlays on the sides for greater midfoot support Uniform surface with stitch detailing for greater ball feel and accuracy Midsole Phylon midsole with injected EVA footbed for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Outsole TFU plates with cleats for better grip Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
